examples.title: Basic mkdir() Example
examples.description: Simple program to create a directory with specified permissions
examples.explanation: Creates directory 'mydir' with permissions rwxr-xr-x (755). Uses perror() to display error message on failure.

examples.title: Basic rmdir() Example
examples.description: Program to remove an empty directory with error handling
examples.explanation: Removes empty directory 'mydir'. perror() displays specific error like ENOTEMPTY if directory contains files.

examples.title: Creating Multiple Directories
examples.description: Program to create directory hierarchy by creating each level sequentially
examples.explanation: Creates directory hierarchy level by level. Each mkdir() call creates one directory; parent must exist.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is number of directories

examples.title: Safe Directory Removal with Checks
examples.description: Program that checks directory status before attempting removal
examples.explanation: Comprehensive function that checks directory existence, type, and prevents removal of current directory before calling rmdir().
